DISCHARGE SUMMARY
================================================================

Hospital:          St. Luke's Medical Center Quezon City
Patient Name:      Luis Madrigal Dimasalang
Date of Birth:     1987-11-08
Age/Sex:           22 / M
Address:           Blk 28 Lot 30, Maharlika Hwy, Brgy. Tatalon, Quezon City, Metro Manila, 1434
Contact Number:    0968 379 4026
PhilHealth PIN:    54-235116155-9
TIN:               407-816-184-002

Admitting Physician:  Dr. Paul Duterte
PRC License No:       3413164
Date of Admission:    1990-09-05
Date of Discharge:    2007-01-12

--------------------------------------------------------------
CLINICAL SUMMARY
--------------------------------------------------------------

Ang pasyente na si Luis Madrigal Dimasalang ay na-admit last 1990-09-05 dahil sa matinding sakit ng tyan at lagnat. After thorough workup, nadetect na may acute appendicitis. Nagkaroon ng successful laparoscopic appendectomy. Recovery was uneventful at stable na ang pasyente bago mag-discharge. Pinag-advise ng low-fiber diet sa unang linggo at strict follow-up sa surgeon.

Follow-up consultation: please return to Cardiology Clinic on 1964-08-04.
For concerns, contact Paul Duterte at (02) 6534-1928 or email fernando.pascual@up.edu.ph.

Signed,
Dr. Paul Duterte, MD
PRC License No. 3413164

COMPLAINANT:
    Name:       Rose Jimenez Defensor

    Contact:    0895 424 3584

RESPONDENT:
    Name:       Miguel Bautista King
    Age/Sex:    53 / M
    Address:    Blk 62 Lot 77, Bonifacio St, Brgy. Masibay, Nunungan, Lanao del Norte, 2993

NATURE OF INCIDENT: Physical Injuries

FACTS OF THE CASE:
Nagsumbong ang complainant na noong nakasaad na petsa at oras, ang respondent ay naghagis ng bato sa kanilang bakuran na tumama sa bintana ng kanilang bahay. Dahil sa galit ng complainant, nakipagtalo siya sa respondent at halos magsuntukan kung hindi dahil sa pakikialam ng kapitbahay. Humihingi ng tulong ang complainant para sa pag-issue ng Barangay Protection Order.

Entered by:   PO2 Ernesto Aquino
Badge No:     469549

REPUBLIC OF THE PHILIPPINES )
CITY OF Pasig                 ) S.S.

AFFIDAVIT OF COMPLAINT

I, Angel Pamintuan Jimenez, of legal age, Filipino, widowed, and a resident of
Blk 73 Lot 70, P. Burgos St, Brgy. Pagalangan, Victoria, Laguna, 4065, after having been duly sworn in accordance with law, hereby
depose and state:

1. I am the complainant in this case against Margarita Hiyas de Leon, likewise of
   legal age, and a resident of Blk 96 Lot 11, Espana Blvd, Brgy. Barangay 193, Pasay City, Metro Manila, 3415;

2. On or about 1998-05-04, at approximately 3:04 PM,
   while I was at $incident_location, the respondent, without any justifiable cause or provocation on my part, verbally threatened me with physical harm and then proceeded to push me causing me to fall and sustain injuries to my right elbow and hip;

3. That I am executing this affidavit to attest to the truth of the foregoing
   and to support the filing of appropriate criminal charges against
   Margarita Hiyas de Leon.

IN WITNESS WHEREOF, I have hereunto set my hand this 19th day of May, 1976
at Manila, Philippines.

                                                Angel Pamintuan Jimenez
                                                Affiant
                                                TIN: 843-229-409-002
                                                Mobile: 0945 085 2449

SUBSCRIBED AND SWORN TO before me this 19th day of May, 1976 at Manila,
Philippines, affiant exhibiting to me his/her competent proof of identity,
to wit: PhilSys ID No. 9242-1739-1040-4551.

                                                Atty. Martin Lim
                                                Notary Public
                                                PRC No. 0370962
                                                Commission No. 188-2026
                                                Until December 31, 2026

Date of Admission:    2007-09-08
Date of Discharge:    1961-10-04

--------------------------------------------------------------
CLINICAL SUMMARY
--------------------------------------------------------------

Si Carmen Bulaklak Guinto ay na-admit dahil sa community-acquired pneumonia. After completing 7-day IV antibiotic course and oxygen support, improved na ang clinical condition. Follow-up chest X-ray showed resolution of infiltrates. Pinag-advise ng continued home oxygen kung may episode ng hirap sa paghinga, at strict hand hygiene.

Follow-up consultation: please return to Cardiology Clinic on 2019-01-20.
For concerns, contact Enrique Estrada at (02) 7977-6825 or email angel_catacutan@gmail.com.

Signed,
Dr. Enrique Estrada, MD
PRC License No. 4916728
